'''varacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pobs|pobs]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pobs|pobs]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| varacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væræchæth|væræchæth]] || [[word:væræchæj|væræchæj]] || [[word:væræchæsh|væræchæsh]] || [[word:væræchæ|væræchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vararachath|vararachath]] || [[word:vararachaj|vararachaj]] || [[word:vararachash|vararachash]] || [[word:vararacha|vararacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:varachath|varachath]] || [[word:varachaj|varachaj]] || [[word:varachash|varachash]] || [[word:varacha|varacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:varafchath|varafchath]] || [[word:varafchaj|varafchaj]] || [[word:varafchash|varafchash]] || [[word:varafchaf|varafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:varachatha|varachatha]] || [[word:varachaja|varachaja]] || [[word:varachasha|varachasha]] || [[word:varachaka|varachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:varachath|varachath]] || [[word:varachaj|varachaj]] || [[word:varachash|varachash]] || [[word:varacha|varacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:varachathal|varachathal]] || [[word:varachajal|varachajal]] || [[word:varachashal|varachashal]] || [[word:varachakal|varachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:varachathatha|varachathatha]] || [[word:varachajaja|varachajaja]] || [[word:varachashasha|varachashasha]] || [[word:varachaka|varachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:varachathan|varachathan]] || [[word:varachajan|varachajan]] || [[word:varachashan|varachashan]] || [[word:varachakan|varachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:varachathaoro|varachathaoro]] || [[word:varachajaoro|varachajaoro]] || [[word:varachashaoro|varachashaoro]] || [[word:varachakaoro|varachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
